data.title: Five ways being utilized by individuals: Claude Code generates code when prompted, enabling creation of programs and apps by non-coders.
data.description: A new artificial intelligence tool has been developed to assist individuals in generating computer code by typing prompts. This tool aims to enable those with no coding experience to create their own programs and apps efficiently. By entering prompts into the tool, users can easily generate code, reducing the barrier to entry for programming. This innovation marks a significant development in the tech industry, potentially allowing a broader audience to engage in coding and develop software. The tool is equipped with advanced algorithms that analyze the prompts and generate the corresponding code swiftly. With this tool, individuals can now explore programming without extensive prior knowledge, making it accessible to a larger population. This groundbreaking technology showcases how AI can simplify complex tasks and democratize programming.

data.title: Sungrow ranked 12th globally and #1 in electrical equipment sector on Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 list.
data.description: In HEFEI, China, on January 23, 2026, Sungrow, a well-known renewable energy company, was recognized on Corporate Knights' 2026 Global 100 list of the most sustainable corporations worldwide during the World Economic Forum in Davos. The company secured the 12th position on the list and claimed the top spot in terms of sustainability.

data.title: Severe storm threatens U.S. power grids; freezing conditions may result in outages, leaving millions without electricity.
data.description: Officials from electric grid management are warning that the current cold weather conditions, along with ice and snow, may result in power disruptions in numerous areas, potentially affecting millions of individuals with blackouts.

data.title: PRG Real Estate's 2025 Year in Review highlights launch of PRG Gives for community service; focuses on corporate giving.
data.description: In January 23, 2026, Philadelphia-based PRG Real Estate celebrated their successful year in 2025, which saw the introduction of PRG Gives. This initiative aims to enhance PRG's community service endeavors throughout its various properties. Through PRG Gives, the company is reinforcing its dedication to societal impact and engagement.

data.title: Ozelle to present AI-powered diagnostics at WHX Labs Dubai 2026, Feb 10-13. Theme: "AI × CBM." Booth S1.D58.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on January 23, 2026, Ozelle, a leading global provider of intelligent diagnostics, is set to present its latest solution at WHX Labs Dubai 2026 from February 10 to 13 at Booth S1.D58. Operating under the theme "AI × CBM: The Next-Generation of Complete Blood Morphology," Ozelle will showcase its innovative technology...

data.title: Risen Energy's Hyper-ion Pro HJT modules rank top three globally with 740Wp power rating, leading new era in space energy.
data.description: In Ningbo, China on January 23, 2026, the well-known PV authority TaiyangNews announced the launch of its first-ever 2026 TOP SOLAR MODULES list. Risen Energy's Hyper-ion Pro HJT modules achieved a place in the top three globally, boasting impressive mass-production power rating of 740Wp. This recognition further solidifies Risen Energy's position within the industry and highlights the advancements in solar technology.

data.title: Mark43 welcomes Greater Manchester Mayor and Senior GMP leaders to new UK headquarters in Manchester, showing commitment to the region.
data.description: In Manchester, England, Mark43 welcomed Mayor Andy Burnham and Deputy Mayor Kate Green along with Deputy Chief Constable Terry Woods and other senior leaders from Greater Manchester Police (GMP) to their new offices on January 19, 2026. This visit highlights Mark43's strong dedication to the region, as they selected Manchester as the location for their inaugural UK office. Mark43 has been chosen by GMP to provide a new Records Management System, showcasing their investment in the area.
